signals.evidence: Hiring Senior Data Engineer for BigQuery data lake with Spark/Airflow/dbt stack processing 50M+ events daily
Product Manager role focused on reporting and dashboards, not predictive models — indicates BI maturity but pre-ML stage
No data scientist, ML engineer, or AI-related roles in current postings — engineering team is data-aware but not yet ML-capable
2M+ shipments/month across 200+ customers creates substantial dataset for route optimization and demand forecasting models

top_use_cases.title: Predictive Route Optimization
top_use_cases.rationale: With 2M+ monthly shipments and existing carrier integration data, ML-based route optimization could reduce transit times by 12-18% and fuel costs by 8-15%. The BigQuery data lake already captures the historical data needed for training.
top_use_cases.roi_estimate: 15-20% reduction in per-shipment cost within 6 months

top_use_cases.title: Demand Forecasting for Warehouse Capacity
top_use_cases.rationale: Seasonal shipping volume patterns across 200+ logistics customers create a strong signal for demand prediction. Accurate forecasts would reduce warehouse overstaffing by 20-30% during low periods and prevent capacity shortfalls during peaks.
top_use_cases.roi_estimate: 20-30% reduction in warehouse labor cost variance

top_use_cases.title: Carrier Performance Scoring & Auto-Selection
top_use_cases.rationale: Historical carrier delivery data enables an automated scoring model that selects optimal carriers per route and package type. Currently manual carrier selection likely leaves 10-15% cost savings on the table.
top_use_cases.roi_estimate: 10-15% reduction in carrier spend through intelligent selection

reasoning: CargoLogik is at the Developing stage (2.3/5) of AI maturity. They have strong data infrastructure foundations — a BigQuery data lake, Airflow pipelines, and engineering talent experienced with large-scale data processing. However, they have not yet hired ML-specific roles or deployed any predictive models. Their current analytics are descriptive (dashboards and reports), not predictive. The 2M+ monthly shipment volume and 200+ customer base provide excellent training data density for logistics-specific ML models. The highest-ROI opportunity is predictive route optimization, which directly leverages their existing data assets and addresses their core value proposition of supply chain optimization.
